---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to spur-python
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

What would you like spur-python to do?

## Why this belongs in spur-python

Is this about the public API, numerical behavior, parity with `spuR` / Stata, docs/examples, or packaging/CI?

## Alternatives considered

What are you doing today instead?

## Additional context

Examples, code snippets, related issues, or parity expectations versus `spuR` / Stata.
